DATA STRUCTURES.core_failure_insights: Students frequently struggle with edge-case memory handling, pointer rewires in raw code blocks, and calculating time complexity boundaries.
DATA STRUCTURES.tactical_advice: Draw out box-and-pointer memory diagrams by hand on paper before attempting to translate data structure mutations into code lines.

SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE.core_failure_insights: Difficulty visualizing abstract physical data pipelines, assembly registers, and internal CPU scheduling intervals.
SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE.tactical_advice: Focus heavily on solving previous 5-year exam numerical problems relating to cache miss-rate calculations.

DISCRETE MATHEMATICS.core_failure_insights: The leap from traditional calculus numbers to formal abstract logic proofs and combinatorics structures often catches students off guard.
DISCRETE MATHEMATICS.tactical_advice: Master the fundamental templates for Direct Proofs and Mathematical Induction; they are reliable sources of exam marks.

DATABASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS.core_failure_insights: Misunderstanding structural relational dependencies, causing incorrect schema normalization and broken transaction constraints.
DATABASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS.tactical_advice: Practice breaking down multi-table relational word problems into nested SQL queries step-by-step.
